name: BITS Transfer Job Download From Direct IP
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: BITS Transfer Job Download From Direct IP
SIGMA Description: Detects a BITS transfer job downloading file(s) from a direct IP address.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://3%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://5%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://6%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://9%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://3%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://5%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://6%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://9%')) AND (NOT(((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://10.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://192.168.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.16.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.17.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.18.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.19.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.20.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.21.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.22.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.23.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.24.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.25.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.26.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.27.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.28.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.29.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.30.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.31.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://127.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://169.254.%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://7-%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://7-%')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BITS Transfer Job Download From Direct IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=16403 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://3%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://5%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://6%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://9%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://2%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://3%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://5%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://6%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://7%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://8%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://9%')) AND (NOT(((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://10.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://192.168.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.16.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.17.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.18.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.19.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.20.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.21.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.22.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.23.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.24.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.25.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.26.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.27.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.28.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.29.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.30.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://172.31.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://127.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://169.254.%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%https://7-%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://7-%')))) AQL filter query
